hero.subtitle: Generate test cases, analyze requirements and discover edge cases automatically.
hero.trustedBy: Trusted by QA teams shipping faster

features.title: Everything your QA workflow needs
features.subtitle: AI JUN plugs into the way you already work and turns requirements into airtight test coverage.

testCases.title: Test Case Generation
testCases.description: Turn a requirement into a complete, structured suite of test cases in seconds — positive, negative and boundary paths included.

requirements.title: Requirement Analysis
requirements.description: Spot ambiguity, missing acceptance criteria and contradictions before they reach development.

edgeCases.title: Edge Case Detection
edgeCases.description: Surface the rare, high-risk scenarios humans miss, ranked by likelihood and impact.

automation.title: Automation Assistant
automation.description: Get ready-to-adapt automation ideas and scaffolding so your suite scales with the product.

howItWorks.title: From specification to coverage in four steps
howItWorks.subtitle: A focused workflow that keeps you in control while AI does the heavy lifting.

step1.title: Upload specification
step1.description: Drop in a requirement, user story or PRD. AI JUN reads it the way a senior QA would.

step2.title: AI analyzes requirements
step2.description: It maps acceptance criteria, flags gaps and identifies the risk areas worth testing.

step3.title: Generate test cases
step3.description: Receive structured cases with steps, expected results and edge scenarios ready to run.

step4.title: Improve QA workflow
step4.description: Refine, export and automate. Your coverage compounds with every iteration.

demo.title: See AI JUN in action
demo.subtitle: A live look at how requirements become coverage, risk analysis and edge cases.
demo.requirementBody: User can pay with a saved card. Apply a discount code at checkout. Show an error for an expired card.
demo.edge1: Discount code applied after card decline

roadmap.title: Where AI JUN is headed
roadmap.subtitle: Shipping in the open. Here's what's live and what's coming next.

social.title: Build the future of QA with us
social.subtitle: Star the repo, join the chat, and follow along as AI JUN grows.

footer.builtWith: Built for QA teams who ship with confidence.
